spec.description: Overview for VictoriaMetrics cluster v1.29.0 or higher

spec.title: Ingestion rate ($pod)
spec.description: Shows how many rows per second every storage node accepts. This metric doesn't show all stored rows since some of them may be dropped because of wrong timestamps or decode errors.

spec.title: Churn rate ($pod)
spec.description:
Shows how many of new time-series are created every second.  High churn rate tightly connected with database performance and may result in unexpected OOM's or slow queries. It is recommended to always keep an eye on this metric to avoid unexpected cardinality "explosions".

Good references to read:
* https://www.robustperception.io/cardinality-is-key
* https://www.robustperception.io/using-tsdb-analyze-to-investigate-churn-and-cardinality

spec.title: Active time series ($pod)
spec.description:
Shows the number of active time series with new data points inserted during the last hour. High value may result in ingestion slowdown. 

See following link for details:

spec.title: Pending datapoints ($instance)
spec.description: How many datapoints are in RAM queue waiting to be written into storage. The less is better.

spec.title: Datapoints ($pod)
spec.description: How many datapoints are in the storage.

spec.title: Disk space usage (datapoints) ($pod)
spec.description: Shows amount of on-disk space occupied by data points.

spec.title: Datapoints ingestion rate ($pod)
spec.description: How many datapoints are inserted into storage per second

spec.title: Disk space usage (index)  ($pod)
spec.description: Shows amount of on-disk space occupied by inverted index.

spec.title: LSM parts ($pod)
spec.description:
Data parts of LSM tree.
High number of parts could be an evidence of slow merge performance - check the resource utilization.
* `indexdb` - inverted index
* `storage/small` - recently added parts of data ingested into storage(hot data)
* `storage/big` -  small parts gradually merged into big parts (cold data)

spec.title: Total datapoints
spec.description: How many datapoints are in storage

spec.title: Index size
spec.description: How many entries inverted index contains. This value is proportional to the number of unique timeseries in storage(cardinality).

spec.title: Disk space usage
spec.description: Total amount of used disk space

spec.title: Concurrent inserts ($pod)
spec.description:
Shows how many ongoing insertions are taking place.
* `max` - equal to number of CPU * 2
* `current` - current number of goroutines busy with inserting rows into storage

When `current` hits `max` constantly, it means storage is overloaded and require more CPU.

spec.title: RPC errors ($pod)
spec.description: RPC errors are interconnection errors between cluster components. Errors rate should be 0 if network connection is stable and all components are up and operational.

spec.title: Requests error rate ($pod)
spec.description:
* `*` - unsupported query path
* `/write` - insert into VM
* `/metrics` - query VM system metrics
* `/query` - query instant values
* `/query_range` - query over a range of time
* `/series` - match a certain label set
* `/label/{}/values` - query a list of label values (variables mostly)

spec.title: Active merges ($pod)
spec.description: The number of on-going merges in storage nodes.  It is expected to have high numbers for `storage/small` metric.

spec.title: Merge speed
spec.description: The number of rows merged per second by storage nodes.

spec.title: Cache size ($pod)
spec.description: VictoriaMetrics stores various caches in RAM. Memory size for these caches may be limited with -`memory.allowedPercent` flag. Line `max allowed` shows max allowed memory size for cache.

spec.title: Cache hit ratio ($pod)
spec.description: VictoriaMetrics stores various caches in RAM. Memory size for these caches may be limited with -`memory.allowedPercent` flag. Line `max allowed` shows max allowed memory size for cache.

spec.title: Requests rate ($pod)
spec.description:
* `*` - unsupported query path
* `/write` - insert into VM
* `/metrics` - query VM system metrics
* `/query` - query instant values
* `/query_range` - query over a range of time
* `/series` - match a certain label set
* `/label/{}/values` - query a list of label values (variables mostly)

spec.title: Memory usage ($pod)
spec.description: Amount of used memory (resident)

spec.title: RPC network usage ($pod)
spec.description: Network usage by internal VictoriaMetrics RPC protocol

spec.title: Rows ($pod)
spec.description:
Shows number of pushed and sent rows. 
* `Pushed rows` - rows added to internal inserter buffers before send
* `Sent rows` - successfully transmitted rows to storage nodes

spec.title: Rows ($pod) rerouted from
spec.description: The number of rows rerouted from the vmstorage node to healthy nodes when the given node was unhealthy.

spec.title: Query duration ($pod)
spec.description:
The less time it takes is better.
* `*` - unsupported query path
* `/write` - insert into VM
* `/metrics` - query VM system metrics
* `/query` - query instant values
* `/query_range` - query over a range of time
* `/series` - match a certain label set
* `/label/{}/values` - query a list of label values (variables mostly)

spec.title: Rows ($pod) rerouted to
spec.description: The number of rows rerouted to the vmstorage node from other nodes when they were unhealthy.

spec.title: Pending
spec.description: The number of rows or bytes that vminesrt internal buffer contains at the moment.

spec.title: Rows lost  ($pod)
spec.description: The number of rows that were lost because of unhealthy vmstorage nodes.

spec.title: RPC errors ($pod)
spec.description:
Rate of RPC errors by type:
* `Connection` - the number of connection errors to vmstorage node
* `Dial` -  the number of dial errors to vmstorage node.
* `Handshake` - the number of handshake errors to vmstorage node
* `Rerouted` - errors appeared during rerouting of rows from un-healthy storage node to a healthy one.

spec.title: Requests rate ($pod)
spec.description: Request rate accepted by vmselect nodes

spec.title: Concurrent selects ($job)
spec.description:
Shows how many ongoing insertions are taking place.
* `max` - equal to number of CPU * 2 by default. May be configured with `search.maxConcurrentRequests` flag
* `current` - current number of goroutines busy with processing requests

When `current` hits `max` constantly, it means vmselect node is overloaded and require more CPU or higher limits.

spec.title: Requests rate ($pod)
spec.description:
* `*` - unsupported query path
* `/write` - insert into VM
* `/metrics` - query VM system metrics
* `/query` - query instant values
* `/query_range` - query over a range of time
* `/series` - match a certain label set
* `/label/{}/values` - query a list of label values (variables mostly)

spec.title: Concurrent inserts ($pod)
spec.description:
Shows how many ongoing insertions are taking place.
* `max` - equal to number of CPU * 4 by default. May be configured with `maxConcurrentInserts` flag
* `current` - current number of goroutines busy with processing requests

When `current` hits `max` constantly, it means vminsert node is overloaded and require more CPU or higher limits.

spec.title: VictoriaMetrics - compare runs
